title: dryopteris cystopteroides
intro: Dryopteris cystopteroides, also known as the autumn fern or cystopteris, is a type of perennial fern native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of D. cystopteroides include reducing pain and swelling, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of D. cystopteroides can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for topical or internal use, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
